notes: Hardware-based trusted computing for processors; renamed Intel TXT (Trusted Execution Technology) circa 2006
Defined as LT + OS + applications; all three required for secure computing platform
Hardware security module standard from TCG; related to LT ecosystem. TPM 2.0 became mandatory for Windows 11 in 2021
Successor name for LaGrande Technology; launched in enterprise Xeon processors circa 2006
Microsoft's trusted computing OS initiative; complementary to Intel LT. Referenced indirectly via TCG/Microsoft NDA discussions
